description: Assertions for a controlled score where only synthetic-job-001 qualifies.
assertions: At most 10 Actor items reach one OpenAI batch request.
Only schema-valid scores at or above the configured threshold reach delivery.
Every qualified job is upserted to Google Sheets before Slack runs.
Slack receives one digest with no more than five jobs.
An immediate delivered-item rerun creates no destination writes.
A Google Sheets or Slack failure does not commit job IDs to the delivery ledger.
